overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a post-apocalyptic urban environment with destroyed vehicles, extensive graffiti, and abandoned infrastructure. The character walks through open streets, ascends a large staircase, and enters a covered walkway while encountering scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: destroyed urban plaza with abandoned vehicles and graffiti

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the abandoned plaza past destroyed vehicles and debris

notable_agents.action: figure sitting near the building entrance on the left side

entered.detail: wrecked vehicle with smoke rising from the engine
line of abandoned and destroyed cars along the right side
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
large concrete staircase leading up to an overpass
elevated highway or train track with concrete supports

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open post-apocalyptic plaza with destroyed vehicles scattered along the sides. Graffiti covers the concrete walls, and a large staircase is visible in the distance leading up to an overpass structure. The area is bathed in bright midday sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase under overpass with graffiti walls

events.description: character approaches and begins ascending the large concrete staircase
character continues climbing stairs, passing NPCs on the steps

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs toward the covered overpass above

notable_agents.action: character in red outfit descending the stairs toward the camera
two characters standing and conversing at the bottom of the stairs

entered.detail: wall with prominent 'NO REGRETS' graffiti text
green metal railing along the left side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open plaza to a narrow concrete staircase ascending under an overpass. The walls are covered in graffiti including prominent 'NO REGRETS' text. Other NPCs are encountered on the stairs - some sitting, some walking down - while the character climbs toward the covered area above.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with abandoned shops

events.description: character enters the covered walkway at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor past abandoned storefronts

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench against the right wall

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with fluorescent lights of the covered passage
blue sign with white text reading 'LOTS' above a shop entrance
large square support columns lining the walkway
concrete seating along the right side of the corridor

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the character enters a semi-covered pedestrian walkway with a concrete ceiling and large support pillars. Abandoned shops line the sides, including one with a 'LOTS' sign. The lighting is dimmer here, mixed between natural light from the entrance and artificial overhead lights. An NPC sits on a bench to the right as the character proceeds deeper into the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open post-apocalyptic plaza into a dim, enclosed pedestrian corridor. It begins in the wide-open square under bright midday sunlight, moving past destroyed vehicles and graffiti-covered concrete walls toward a distant overpass. As the character reaches the structure, the scene shifts to a narrow concrete staircase where the camera ascends past NPCs and prominent "NO REGRETS" graffiti. The movement then transitions from the open air into a semi-covered walkway, where the lighting dims and mixes with artificial overhead glows. Finally, the camera proceeds deeper into the corridor, passing large support pillars and abandoned shops, including one with a "LOTS" sign, while an NPC sits on a nearby bench.
